title: mesosphaerum clavelliferum
intro: Mesosphaerum clavelliferum, also known as Lemon Bee Balm, is a tropical plant native to the Americas, belonging to the Lamiaceae family and characterized by its fragrant leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum clavelliferum include alleviating congestion, relieving headaches, and reducing inflammation, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant often include infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
